free_text: Effect of Pu240 Compound-Nucleus State on the
Fission-Fragment Mass and Kinetic Energy Distributions
Experiment performed using neutron
beam from the Brookhaven Graphite Research Reactor
An enriched 239Pu (99.5%) target prepared by vacuum
evaporation of plutonium fluoride onto a 5 mil thick
nickel foil was used. The thickness of the deposit
was about 18 mu-g/cm2 on an area of about 150 mm2.
Surface barrier detector with active area of
4 cm2
Beryllium filter transmits neutrons bellow 0.0052 eV
Samarium filtered beam comprised  of 80 % of neutrons
from 0.297 eV level
Compiled by S.H.
